docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TERRY MICHAEL HEARING SET FOR JUN-06-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-06-1995, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,880.00 FILED BY PON WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY MICHAEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PON WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TERRY MICHAEL $260.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $295.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PON WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TERRY MICHAEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-16-1995, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-27-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
